rationale: Gathering aborted at honesty verification (status: partial_honesty_abort). The Player claimed test files tests/integration/test_metadata_filter.py and tests/integration/test_concurrent_writes.py exist and pass, but honesty verification reports path_exists=False for both files. No downstream evidence was gathered (tests, coverage, BDD all null). Per absence-of-failure guards (Guard 5: GATHERING-STATUS), null evidence fields are ABSENT SIGNAL and cannot support approval. The Player must create the actual test files and ensure they exist in the working tree before verification can proceed.
